sn_mcp_ai_skill_tool_definition.description: Classifies user questions into business intents for IncentNow Copilot such as payout, quota, statement, plan, lookup rules, earning rules, YTD payout, and compensation explanations. This skill only returns the intent name and does not generate business responses.
sn_mcp_ai_skill_tool_definition.label: IncentNow Intent Classifier
sn_mcp_ai_skill_tool_definition.name: x_ctans_incentnow.incentnow_intent_classifier
